creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
If I understood your question correctly. To create/submit
a new port. You can attach it as a shar(1) file. eg;
$ shar `find port-name` > portname.shar

I know it's *somewhere* in the porters handbook. But I
think just knowing the basic command should be evidence
enough for you to understand what's required. :-)

Good luck!

--Chris
